title: elaphoglossum correae
intro: Elaphoglossum correae, also known as Correa's elaphoglossum, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Native to Mexico, this plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum correae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even help in the treatment of certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Elaphoglossum correae can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or mixing them with other herbs to create teas and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
